error_signature: Error relocating isolated-vm/out/isolated_vm.node: symbol not found
title: External task runner crashes on startup after Node.js upgrade
symptom: All external task runner instances crash-loop on startup, causing Code node executions to fail with task timeouts.
not_this_if: Using the main n8n image with built-in runners
root_cause: The external task runner image was built with a native addon that was pre-compiled against an older version of Node.js. The upgrade to Node.js v24 introduced an incompatible ABI, causing the native binary to fail to load, leading to an infinite crash loop.
fix_steps: Modify your custom runners Dockerfile to include the rebuild step for isolated-vm.
Add the following lines after copying the task runner files: RUN apk add --no-cache --virtual .build-deps python3 make g++ && npm rebuild isolated-vm && apk del .build-deps.
Rebuild your Docker image for the external task runner.
agent_instruction: Add the rebuild step for isolated-vm in your custom runners Dockerfile and rebuild the image.
